The '''Blackstar Pirates''' were a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang affiliated with the [[Invids]]. When they were based on [[Courkrus]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], they tended to gather in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] called the Mynock Hole, which included a secure and luxurious hideout that other Invids could not access. [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], in his "Ghost Jedi" guise, penetrated their hideout and put on a dramatic display to frighten them. While the Blackstars did not abandon Courkrus like the [[Fastblast]]ers, their ranks were decimated by desertion following this incident and the later "Great [[Shala|Hutt]] Roast".
